status: DRAFT — all 30 cycle-3 findings were processed: most are closed in code+tests; the operator-supplied authorization hash (5), native-binary binding (22 residual), the formal _qp_matrices contract (30), and everything requiring the pinned image or the final commit remain explicitly open. No Stage-3 instance has been run.

source_manifest.note: 19 source files + governance artifacts (test report bound; realism-harness PASS pending in-image); verify_source now also checks record_type/version/files_missing/governance hashes (finding 23)

1_entry_point_not_executing.where: run_clean_successor now constructs production_corpus_source, calls orchestrate() with resolve_instance, and emits the clean-run manifest + disposition exit code; the corpus-regeneration code EXISTS and is reviewable (finding 29) — executing it stays gated on the verified authorization artifact

2_corpus_not_actually_hashed.where: orchestrate derives the corpus hash ITSELF from the actual row bytes (derive_corpus_hash, the registered scheme) before any solve; a lying source is caught; the source's claimed hash must also agree

3_authorization_not_cross_validated.where: cross_validate_authorization(auth, pins): bound_commit/tree/image/oci must EQUAL the pins identities; the artifact must also bind row_manifest_protocol + execution_package_sha256

4_authorization_semantics_not_validated.where: load_authorization enforces record_type, version, decision=='AUTHORIZED', execution_authorized is True, countersigned_by, repository — all fail closed

5_hash_operator_supplied.where: the artifact hash channel is still launcher-controlled; the signed launch attestation remains a pre-countersignature item

6_harness_no_pins_comparison.where: harness verdict now requires a FULL preflight evaluate() PASS against the countersigned pins + static manifest (loaded and hash-verified); pins absent → the harness CANNOT pass

7_validate_outcome_incomplete.where: validate_outcome now enforces solver identities, accepted_z byte-equal to the attempt z, finiteness, the complete REQUIRED_CERT_FIELDS set with qualifies exactly True, z/lam lengths vs the problem (rec param), and STOP-state consistency (UNRESOLVED/INVALID_RUN structural invariants)

8_evidence_not_recertifiable.where: numerical_evidence preserves the COMPLETE input problem (every component as exact rationals + shape); _certificate_fields RAISES on any missing registered field

9_canonicalize_stops_inside_cascade.where: the runner canonicalizes ONCE per row and uses that immutable record for manifest comparison, resolution, and evidence

10_io_failure_not_preserved.where: sink-open/mark_failed/mark_complete/close failures → emergency sidecar (<checkpoint>.emergency.json) + evidence_persisted flag; 'the terminal always is' claim withdrawn

11_iterator_failures.where: iter(rows) creation AND the post-population drain are guarded; non-StopIteration exceptions → ROW_ITERATOR_ERROR terminal

12_checkpoint_not_reverified.where: aggregate_verdict re-verifies every record_sha256, every input_content_hash vs the manifest, class/order/count, single COMPLETE terminal as final event, terminal n_records, zero corruption

13_silent_corruption_tolerance.where: read_checkpoint is STRICT: malformed non-final lines, unknown event kinds, duplicate terminals, events after the terminal → corruption; precheck refuses corrupt checkpoints

14_row_manifest_schema_weak.where: RowIdentityManifest.defect(): dict entries with exactly {row_id, content_hash}, int/str ids, 64-lowercase-hex hashes (rows AND corpus), nonempty, unique

15_run_manifest_omits_provenance.where: OrchestrationConfig.provenance (auth/pins/manifest/package hashes, commit/tree, digests, preflight-report hash) is bound into the clean-run manifest; run_clean_successor populates it

16_manifest_not_tied_to_checkpoint.where: the run manifest binds checkpoint_sha256 (final bytes) + row_manifest_sha256

17_orchestrate_not_fail_closed.where: orchestrate wraps the full body; any exception → governed STOP with a failure fingerprint, never an escaping traceback

18_output_dir_controls_absent.where: _output_root_defect: out_dir exists/non-symlink/EMPTY; checkpoint realpath inside the root

19_registry_not_fully_sealed.where: _SealableRegistry blocks setitem/delitem/clear/pop/popitem/update/setdefault for ALL keys after seal; documented as accidental-mutation protection, not a cryptographic boundary — one-shot container + fingerprints carry the rest

20_fingerprint_pinning_not_closed.where: REQUIRED_FINGERPRINT_KEYS is a closed 5-key set enforced by BOTH seal_implementations and preflight (missing or extra keys fail)

21_material_config_one_way.where: material sections are compared TWO-WAY (_dict_diff_exact): extra observed keys inside a material subtree fail

22_package_set_not_exactly_closed.where: extra names in the pin map are rejected; native shared-object binding is explicitly delegated to the image digest + launch attestation

23_verify_source_ignores_governance.where: verify_source checks record_type, version, files_missing, and hash-verifies present governance artifacts

24_manifest_omits_package_itself.where: the package/manifest cannot bind their own bytes; the AUTHORIZATION artifact binds execution_package_sha256 + source_manifest_sha256 + expected_pins_sha256 (enforced by load_authorization), closing the loop one level up

25_harness_cert_test_weak.where: the case is renamed certifier_classification, states its claim (primary enum only), and records — without asserting — the real-fallback disposition

26_persistence_verification_incomplete.where: post-write verification compares the FULL canonical document hash of the persisted bytes, not just the verdict string

28_all_35_addressed_too_strong.where: this record and the .md say: all findings processed; most closed; several partial; execution-critical portions open

29_corpus_regen_code_must_exist_first.where: production_corpus_source is real, reviewable code (frozen capture over the DEV window, canonical rows, derived hashes) — only its EXECUTION is gated

30_input_contract_open.where: the formal _qp_matrices-derived input contract remains to be enumerated and diffed against validate_model_inputs before countersignature

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: signed launch attestation for image/OCI identity + the authorization-hash channel (findings 5, 22-native)
the final implementation commit + tree; full 64-hex OCI config digest
the countersigned expected-pins + execution-authorization artifacts (schemas now enforced in code)
an in-image realism-harness PASS artifact (now preflight-gated) at the pinned image
a final test report: clean tree, pinned image, production-binding test RUN (finding 27)
the formally-enumerated _qp_matrices input contract vs validate_model_inputs (finding 30)
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. run_clean_successor refuses without a verified, semantically-valid, cross-validated countersigned authorization artifact. MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
